notes: v0.5.0 — New Live Render tab (6th tab). Captures the current SU view and feeds it to Gemini 2.5 Flash Image (via Cloudflare AI Gateway) every 5–30s, producing a photorealistic render side-by-side with the input frame. Picks model from a dropdown (gemini-2.5-flash-image default), interval picker (5/10/20/30s), editable render prompt, last-8 history strip, today's render count + cost meter ($0.40/M output tokens; ~$0.0005/render). All HTTP runs on a background thread (~10s blocking) — UI never freezes. New constants: GEMINI_IMAGE_MODELS. New method: call_gemini_image. build_gemini_payload now skips thinkingConfig + maxOutputTokens for image models (they reject both).
